name: Mondia Mukombero Root
description: A popular indigenous forest woody climber, iconic in Western Kenya. The vanilla-scented roots are rich in coumarins, saponins, and zinc, acting as a highly potent metabolic adaptogen, pediatric appetite stimulant, and central fatigue reliever.
preparation: Appetite & Fatigue Recovery: Clean fresh roots thoroughly and chew raw. Alternatively, steep 3g of dry root powder in 250ml of warm water or milk once daily.
safetyAlert: Exceptionally safe and highly nutritious. Highly valued in traditional Luhya and East African contexts.
interactions: None known. Safe to administer alongside dietary interventions.
